summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Map View and Cancellation/Refund Workflow features. All 17 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend map view with Leaflet/OpenStreetMap and cancellation dialog with refund preview are fully functional.
passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/markets returns 200 with 20 markets
Backend: GET /api/markets has required fields (code, name, currency, flag)
Backend: GET /api/markets includes Turkey (TR) with TRY currency
Backend: GET /api/bookings/{id}/cancellation-info requires authentication (401)
Backend: GET /api/bookings/{id}/cancellation-info returns refund preview
Backend: GET /api/bookings/{id}/cancellation-info has correct structure (policy, refund_preview)
Backend: GET /api/bookings/{id}/cancellation-info returns 404 for invalid booking
Backend: GET /api/cancellations requires authentication (401)
Backend: GET /api/cancellations returns user's cancellation list
Backend: GET /api/admin/cancellations requires admin role (403)
Backend: GET /api/admin/cancellations returns list with pagination
Backend: POST /api/bookings/{id}/cancel requires authentication (401)
Backend: POST /api/bookings/{id}/cancel returns 404 for invalid booking
Backend: POST /api/bookings/{id}/cancel successfully cancels booking with refund calculation
Backend: POST /api/search returns hotels for Istanbul
Backend: Search results have required fields for map view (hotel_id, name, min_price, address)
Frontend: Map view toggle (Liste/Harita buttons) working
Frontend: Leaflet map with OpenStreetMap tiles loads correctly
Frontend: Hotel price markers displayed on map (₺4,200, ₺2,500, ₺1,600)
Frontend: Map legend shows hotel count (3 otel bulundu)
Frontend: Map close button (X) present
Frontend: UserDashboard loads with booking tabs (Upcoming, Past, Cancelled)
Frontend: Cancel button (İptal Et) visible on confirmed bookings
Frontend: Cancel dialog opens with booking details
Frontend: Cancel dialog shows refund preview (İade: ₺4,500)
Frontend: Cancel dialog shows policy info (1 gün öncesine kadar ücretsiz iptal)
Frontend: Cancel dialog has Vazgeç and Rezervasyonu İptal Et buttons

success_rate.frontend: 100% (all map view and cancellation features working)

features: Hotel price markers with TRY prices
Close button to return to list view
Calculates refund based on hotel cancellation policy
Cancel button (İptal Et) on confirmed upcoming bookings
Dialog shows booking reference and check-in date
Dialog shows total price and days until check-in
Dialog shows refund preview with policy message
Green highlight for full refund, amber for partial, red for no refund
Vazgeç (Cancel) and Rezervasyonu İptal Et (Confirm) buttons

seed_data_creation: Test booking created and cleaned up: booking_test_cancel_mn6hxeo1
context_for_next_testing_agent: Map view uses Leaflet with OpenStreetMap tiles. HotelMap component at /app/frontend/src/components/HotelMap.jsx handles map rendering with price markers. Cancellation workflow uses policy-based refund calculation (free_cancellation_days, penalty_percentage). Cancel dialog in UserDashboard fetches /api/bookings/{id}/cancellation-info for refund preview before confirming. All 20 markets endpoint at /api/markets provides country data for market-based pricing.
